/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -march=native -fopt-info-vec-optimized -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ecs_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ecs_tests.dir/tests/commands_basic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs_tests.dir/tests/entity_events_basic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs_tests.dir/tests/entity_manager_basic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs_tests.dir/tests/query_basic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs_tests.dir/tests/system_basic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs_tests.dir/tests/system_condition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs_tests.dir/tests/table_map_basic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs_tests.dir/tests/world_components_basic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs_tests.dir/tests/world_entities_basic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs_tests.dir/tests/world_events_basic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs_tests.dir/tests/world_relations_basic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs_tests.dir/tests/world_singletons_basic.cpp.o -o ecs_tests  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu libecs.a -ltcc /usr/local/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcriterion.so
